markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Deep dive into the Fleet product and its core differentiators.](https://fathom.video/share/cGJgvz9pYgxG8YbGNxbrhqDGw4_poPob?tab=summary&timestamp=71.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Core Differentiators:** Fleet's key strengths are its cross-platform "flattening" (e.g., one checkbox enables disk encryption on Mac, Windows, & Linux), powerful OS Query data collection, and GitOps for version-controlled configuration.](https://fathom.video/share/cGJgvz9pYgxG8YbGNxbrhqDGw4_poPob?tab=summary&timestamp=2749.0)
  - [**Extensibility:** The platform is designed for extensibility, using generic webhooks for automation (e.g., policy failures → Jira tickets) and allowing use alongside other MDMs for data collection.](https://fathom.video/share/cGJgvz9pYgxG8YbGNxbrhqDGw4_poPob?tab=summary&timestamp=473.0)
  - [**"Open Device Management":** The open-source core builds trust, especially with developer-heavy teams and Linux users who are often resistant to management.](https://fathom.video/share/cGJgvz9pYgxG8YbGNxbrhqDGw4_poPob?tab=summary&timestamp=3383.0)
  - [**Content Strategy:** The brand voice must be clear and truthful, avoiding jargon and buzzwords. Every technical term must be explained to maintain credibility with a technical audience.](https://fathom.video/share/cGJgvz9pYgxG8YbGNxbrhqDGw4_poPob?tab=summary&timestamp=2867.0)

## Topics

### Product Philosophy & Differentiators

  - [**Cross-Platform "Flattening":** A core goal is to simplify management across platforms.](https://fathom.video/share/cGJgvz9pYgxG8YbGNxbrhqDGw4_poPob?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
      - [**Example:** A single checkbox enables disk encryption on Mac, Windows, and Linux, abstracting away the underlying technical differences.](https://fathom.video/share/cGJgvz9pYgxG8YbGNxbrhqDGw4_poPob?tab=summary&timestamp=1270.0)
  - [**Extensibility Over Prescriptive Features:** The platform uses generic tools (e.g., webhooks) to trigger workflows in other systems (e.g., Tynes, Jira), providing more power than competitors' built-in features.](https://fathom.video/share/cGJgvz9pYgxG8YbGNxbrhqDGw4_poPob?tab=summary&timestamp=584.0)
  - [**"Open Device Management":** The open-source core builds trust by allowing users to inspect the code.](https://fathom.video/share/cGJgvz9pYgxG8YbGNxbrhqDGw4_poPob?tab=summary&timestamp=3383.0)
      - [**Use Case:** This is critical for managing developer-heavy teams and Linux users, who are often resistant to management.](https://fathom.video/share/cGJgvz9pYgxG8YbGNxbrhqDGw4_poPob?tab=summary&timestamp=3383.0)

### Core Technology: OS Query

  - [**Function:** OS Query (from Facebook) expresses all device data as SQLite tables.](https://fathom.video/share/cGJgvz9pYgxG8YbGNxbrhqDGw4_poPob?tab=summary&timestamp=1910.0)
  - [**Agent:** The `fleetd` agent includes two components:](https://fathom.video/share/cGJgvz9pYgxG8YbGNxbrhqDGw4_poPob?tab=summary&timestamp=1940.0)
    1.  [**OS Query Agent:** Collects device data.](https://fathom.video/share/cGJgvz9pYgxG8YbGNxbrhqDGw4_poPob?tab=summary&timestamp=1952.0)
    2.  [**Orbit:** The main Fleet agent, equivalent to the Jamf or Kanji binary.](https://fathom.video/share/cGJgvz9pYgxG8YbGNxbrhqDGw4_poPob?tab=summary&timestamp=1952.0)
  - [**Benefit:** This architecture allows admins to query any device data using standard SQL, providing a powerful, flexible data collection engine.](https://fathom.video/share/cGJgvz9pYgxG8YbGNxbrhqDGw4_poPob?tab=summary&timestamp=1981.0)

### Core Workflow: Policies & Automation

  - [**Policies:** Use OS Query to assess a device's state (e.g., "is the Brave browser installed?") and return a simple true/false (Boolean) result.](https://fathom.video/share/cGJgvz9pYgxG8YbGNxbrhqDGw4_poPob?tab=summary&timestamp=2200.0)
  - [**Automation Trigger:** A policy *failure* is the trigger for all automation.](https://fathom.video/share/cGJgvz9pYgxG8YbGNxbrhqDGw4_poPob?tab=summary&timestamp=1868.0)
  - [**Automation Types:**](https://fathom.video/share/cGJgvz9pYgxG8YbGNxbrhqDGw4_poPob?tab=summary&timestamp=2234.0)
      - [**Auto-Remediation:** On failure, Fleet can automatically:](https://fathom.video/share/cGJgvz9pYgxG8YbGNxbrhqDGw4_poPob?tab=summary&timestamp=2234.0)
          - [Send a generic webhook.](https://fathom.video/share/cGJgvz9pYgxG8YbGNxbrhqDGw4_poPob?tab=summary&timestamp=2234.0)
          - [Create a ticket (Jira, Zendesk).](https://fathom.video/share/cGJgvz9pYgxG8YbGNxbrhqDGw4_poPob?tab=summary&timestamp=2234.0)
          - [Run a script to fix the issue.](https://fathom.video/share/cGJgvz9pYgxG8YbGNxbrhqDGw4_poPob?tab=summary&timestamp=2234.0)
          - [Install required software.](https://fathom.video/share/cGJgvz9pYgxG8YbGNxbrhqDGw4_poPob?tab=summary&timestamp=2234.0)
      - [**Self-Remediation:** The end-user desktop app notifies the user of the failure and provides instructions to fix it themselves.](https://fathom.video/share/cGJgvz9pYgxG8YbGNxbrhqDGw4_poPob?tab=summary&timestamp=2394.0)

### GitOps: Configuration as Code

  - [**Function:** All Fleet configurations (policies, controls, software) can be managed as YAML files in a version-controlled Git repository.](https://fathom.video/share/cGJgvz9pYgxG8YbGNxbrhqDGw4_poPob?tab=summary&timestamp=2484.0)
  - [**Why it's powerful:**](https://fathom.video/share/cGJgvz9pYgxG8YbGNxbrhqDGw4_poPob?tab=summary&timestamp=2612.0)
      - [**Version Control:** Enables easy rollbacks to previous, stable configurations.](https://fathom.video/share/cGJgvz9pYgxG8YbGNxbrhqDGw4_poPob?tab=summary&timestamp=2612.0)
      - [**Peer Review:** Changes are managed via pull requests, improving stability and collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/cGJgvz9pYgxG8YbGNxbrhqDGw4_poPob?tab=summary&timestamp=2612.0)
      - [**Read-Only UI:** Admins can enable a "GitOps mode" that makes the UI read-only, forcing all changes through code.](https://fathom.video/share/cGJgvz9pYgxG8YbGNxbrhqDGw4_poPob?tab=summary&timestamp=2658.0)

### Platform Structure: Teams

  - [**Purpose:** Teams are the primary organizational unit for grouping devices that require the same management controls.](https://fathom.video/share/cGJgvz9pYgxG8YbGNxbrhqDGw4_poPob?tab=summary&timestamp=739.0)
  - [**Cross-Platform:** A single team can contain devices from multiple OS platforms (Mac, Windows, Linux).](https://fathom.video/share/cGJgvz9pYgxG8YbGNxbrhqDGw4_poPob?tab=summary&timestamp=739.0)
  - [**Enrollment:**](https://fathom.video/share/cGJgvz9pYgxG8YbGNxbrhqDGw4_poPob?tab=summary&timestamp=882.0)
      - [**`fleetctl`:** A CLI tool for admins to build platform-specific enrollment packages (e.g., PKG for Mac, MSI for Windows).](https://fathom.video/share/cGJgvz9pYgxG8YbGNxbrhqDGw4_poPob?tab=summary&timestamp=882.0)
      - [**`no team` (Team ID 0):** A default staging area for devices enrolled without a specific team. Automation can then move them to the correct team.](https://fathom.video/share/cGJgvz9pYgxG8YbGNxbrhqDGw4_poPob?tab=summary&timestamp=1033.0)

### Content & Brand Voice

  - [**Principle:** The brand voice must be clear, precise, and truthful, avoiding jargon and buzzwords.](https://fathom.video/share/cGJgvz9pYgxG8YbGNxbrhqDGw4_poPob?tab=summary&timestamp=2867.0)
  - [**Rule:** Every technical term must be explained.](https://fathom.video/share/cGJgvz9pYgxG8YbGNxbrhqDGw4_poPob?tab=summary&timestamp=2921.0)
      - [**Example:** "JSON" is acceptable; "POC" (Proof of Concept) is not, as it's an unexplained business buzzword.](https://fathom.video/share/cGJgvz9pYgxG8YbGNxbrhqDGw4_poPob?tab=summary&timestamp=2921.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This approach builds credibility with a technical audience and avoids the "fluff" common in AI-generated marketing content.](https://fathom.video/share/cGJgvz9pYgxG8YbGNxbrhqDGw4_poPob?tab=summary&timestamp=2955.0)
